value: Apply online on SRM portal → Appear for SRMJEEE → Attend counselling → Pay fee → Confirm seat

value: 10th marksheet, 12th marksheet, Transfer Certificate, Aadhaar card, Passport size photos, Migration Certificate
Minimum 60% marks in 12th with Physics Chemistry and Mathematics. Age must be at least 17 years.
SRM helpline: 1800-102-1525. Available Monday to Saturday 9AM to 5PM.
For general queries: info@srmist.edu.in | For admissions: admissions@srmist.edu.in
Library is open Monday to Saturday: 8AM to 10PM. Sunday: 9AM to 6PM. Students can borrow 3 books for 14 days.
SRM provides buses from major city locations. Apply for bus pass through student portal at semester start.
Minimum 75% attendance is compulsory to be eligible for end semester examinations.
CGPA is calculated using grade points of all subjects weighted by their credit hours each semester.
